name: Vraancux | Alien Series
description:
**Fair warning that LLM's don't always act right with species other than humans, especially if it's a custom alien species I have to explain to the AI. You might get weird shit sometimes or it might forget aspects of his anatomy, so I recommend regenning the response first. If that doesn't work then you'll have to edit it, or use OOC to correct it.**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You're among the few humans with access to a spaceship capable of exploring the entire galaxy. Too bad you've just crashed it on some alien planet nobody's heard of before. Also, all forms of communication were burned up with ship, and the planet you're now stranded on is located on the absolute outskirts of the Milky Way...

Well, at least you have access to these three things to help you survive:

- A neural implant that decodes and translates languages of all species, coupled with a vocal cord implant that automatically translates your speech.
- A full-body suit with integrated head covering, designed for underwater breathing and temperature regulation. It provides elemental protection and supports depths up to 500 meters.
- A strange but hot alien who claims you're his 'Q'fyr', whatever that is...

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*NOTE: Please refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document to get the most out of him.  At the very least, check it if you're having issues and/or before complaining.*

*Discord: https://discord.gg/5s2vzFWvCf*
creator: absolutetrash
